Bash(for file in src/models/shift.ts src/models/team.ts src/models/tenant.ts src/models/user.ts)
Bash(do awk '/<style>/{start=NR; inside=1} inside && /@import/{if(NR-start>5) print FILENAME"":""NR"":""$0} /<\/style>/{inside=0}' "$file")
Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_USER=assixx_user DB_PASSWORD='AssixxP@ss2025!' DB_NAME=main_test NODE_ENV=test node src/__tests__/debug-test-connection.js)
Bash(JWT_SECRET=test-secret-key-for-github-actions NODE_ENV=test pnpm jest src/routes/__tests__/auth.test.ts --testNamePattern="should successfully login" --verbose)
